data_provenance: Synthetic dataset from `ml/scripts/synthesize_red_flag_dataset.py` — 9 ESI v5 emergency seeds × Gemini paraphrase loop + 60 routine seeds. Pre-deployment requires MBBS panel validation against real emergency-call transcripts (see docs/regulatory/CLINICAL_EVALUATION_PLAN.md).
safety_invariant: The ML layer can ONLY escalate. A NEGATIVE prediction from this classifier never downgrades a positive rule-layer verdict (the 9 deterministic R1-R9 rules remain authoritative). See backend/app/ml/red_flag_classifier.py SAFETY INVARIANT and the pipeline composition in backend/app/triage_logic/pipeline.py.
